resources.string: Copyright © 2024–2026 Nur Fadhilah Fajrin. All rights reserved
Find out your daily water and calorie needs. Enter your data below:
It is recommended to drink about %1$.0f ml every 2–3 hours (±8 times a day)
My daily water need is %1$.2f liters
This application helps calculate daily water and calorie needs based on body weight and activity level to maintain a healthy lifestyle.
Water is essential for maintaining body functions such as metabolism, body temperature, and organ health.
Calories provide energy for daily activities and help maintain proper body functions.
• Body weight • Activity level • Body condition
Water needs are calculated based on body weight and activity level, while calorie needs are based on daily energy requirements.
• Drink water every 2–3 hours • Don’t wait until you feel thirsty • Eat nutritious foods • Adjust intake based on activity
On average, people need about 1.5–2 liters of water per day.
Staying hydrated is especially important during hot weather or high physical activity.
